name: Chocolate Fudge Trifle
recipeIngredient: 4 oz Instant chocolate fudge pudding mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine pudding mix with milk. Whisk until well blended (1 to 2 minutes). The mixture will thicken as mixed.
- Fold in half of whipped cream until well blended and no white streaks remain. Set aside.
2. To assemble trifle:
- Heat raspberry jam in microwave or over low heat until melted when stirred.
- Arrange 4 or 5 slices of pound cake to cover the bottom of a serving dish, curving up the sides slightly.
- Sprinkle 1 tablespoon creme de cacao over the cake.
- Drizzle 1/4 cup chocolate sauce and then 2 tablespoons jam on top. Spread evenly using the back of a spoon.
- Add half of the reserved pudding mixture and spread evenly.
3. Top with additional 3 or 4 slices of pound cake to cover in a single layer.
- Repeat steps 2c-2e using remaining creme de cacao, chocolate sauce, jam, and pudding mixture.
4. Top with remaining 3 or 4 slices of pound cake.
- Drizzle the remaining whipped cream evenly over the top.
- Sprinkle almonds on top.
5. Cover trifle and refrigerate until well chilled (5 to 6 hours or overnight).
- Serve using a large spoon.
